# Label

Associates text with a form control.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/label
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="label" example={0} code={`<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>`} />

```tsx
<Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="label" example={1} code={`<Label required htmlFor="name">Name</Label>`} />

```tsx
<Label required htmlFor="name">
  Name
</Label>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="label" example={2} code={`<Label size="lg">Large label</Label>`} />

```tsx
<Label size="lg">Large label</Label>
```

## Props

| Prop       | Type        | Required | Default | Description |
| ---------- | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `required` | `boolean`   | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`     | `LabelSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant    | Values           |
| ---------- | ---------------- |
| `required` | `true`           |
| `size`     | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/label.json`
- Recipe: `label`
- Files: `src/components/ui/label.tsx`
